skills.title: Lead capture to CRM sync
skills.benefit: Never lose a lead to a slow follow-up again.
skills.desc: Every new form submission instantly creates a CRM contact, assigns it to the right rep, and fires a personalised intro email within 90 seconds.

skills.title: Proposal sent to follow-up sequence
skills.benefit: Close 20-30% more deals with zero extra effort.
skills.desc: The moment a prospect opens your proposal, a 5-touch follow-up cadence starts automatically. It pauses the instant they reply so you never miss a hot lead.

skills.title: Lost deal win-back campaign
skills.benefit: Recover 10-15% of closed-lost revenue on autopilot.
skills.desc: Closed-lost deals re-queued 90 days post-close with updated case studies and a fresh angle. Most businesses leave this money on the table.

skills.title: Referral tracking and reward trigger
skills.benefit: Turn happy clients into a reliable revenue channel.
skills.desc: Detects referral source from UTM, attributes commission to the right partner, and fires a Stripe payout the moment the deal closes. Zero manual reconciliation.

skills.title: Demo no-show re-booking
skills.benefit: Recover 40% of missed demos without lifting a finger.
skills.desc: When a prospect no-shows, the workflow waits 30 minutes then sends a warm re-booking link with a new availability window before they book a competitor.

skills.title: AI lead scoring and prioritisation
skills.benefit: Your reps spend time on leads 3x more likely to close.
skills.desc: Claude AI reads every new lead's LinkedIn, website, and form responses, scores them 0-100, and routes high-scores to senior reps within minutes of capture.

skills.title: Deal stage change to Slack alert
skills.benefit: Keep your whole team aligned on every live deal.
skills.desc: Every time a deal moves stage in your CRM, the relevant Slack channel gets an instant update with context, next steps, and deal owner. No more manual check-ins.

skills.title: Contract signed to kickoff scheduler
skills.benefit: Start every client relationship in under 24 hours.
skills.desc: The moment DocuSign marks a contract complete, the client receives a welcome email, a kickoff call booking link, and your team gets a Slack prompt to prepare the brief.

skills.title: AI-written personalised outreach
skills.benefit: Send 200 personalised emails in the time it takes to write 5.
skills.desc: Claude AI reads each prospect's LinkedIn profile and recent company news, then writes a tailored first line for every outreach email. Sequenced and sent via your email tool.

skills.title: Trial to paid conversion nurture
skills.benefit: Convert 2x more trial users without adding headcount.
skills.desc: Based on usage signals (logins, features used, days remaining), the workflow sends the right message at the right moment: demo offer, case study, or discount.

skills.title: CRM data enrichment
skills.benefit: Stop chasing contacts for information you can fetch automatically.
skills.desc: New contact created then the workflow pulls company size, industry, tech stack, and LinkedIn from Clearbit and fills CRM fields instantly. No manual research.

skills.title: LinkedIn connection to CRM pipeline
skills.benefit: Turn your network activity into a structured sales pipeline.
skills.desc: New LinkedIn connection matched against ICP triggers enrichment lookup, CRM contact creation, and adds them to a gentle nurture sequence. Your network compounds automatically.

skills.title: Invoice generation and payment chase
skills.benefit: Get paid faster. Average debtor days cut by 40%.
skills.desc: Creates an invoice from your project-close event, sends it to the client, then auto-chases at day 7, 14, and 30 with escalating urgency. Late payers get a different tone than slow payers.

skills.title: Expense approval workflow
skills.benefit: Eliminate the email thread that kills Friday afternoons.
skills.desc: Employee submits receipt. Manager notified via Slack with approve/reject buttons. Decision logged. Xero entry created automatically. What took days now takes minutes.

skills.title: Monthly P&L report builder
skills.benefit: Board-ready reports delivered before your morning coffee.
skills.desc: Pulls actuals from Xero, compares against budget in Google Sheets, generates a formatted PDF summary, and emails it to directors every 1st of the month at 7 AM.

skills.title: Stripe payment failed to retry
skills.benefit: Recover 15-25% of failed subscription payments automatically.
skills.desc: Failed charge triggers a retry sequence with smart timing, a client email with a payment link, and a Slack alert to your billing team before the customer even notices.

skills.title: New order to accounting sync
skills.benefit: Zero manual bookkeeping entry for every sale.
skills.desc: Every Shopify or Stripe sale instantly creates the correct accounting entry in Xero or QuickBooks, categorised, tax-coded, and reconciled without anyone touching a spreadsheet.

skills.title: Recurring subscription billing
skills.benefit: Run a subscription business without a billing team.
skills.desc: Manages the full lifecycle: trial end, upgrade, downgrade, pause, reactivation, and churn, with the right email at each step and accounting entries created automatically.

skills.title: AI 13-week cash flow forecast
skills.benefit: Know your cash position 13 weeks out without a CFO.
skills.desc: Pulls receivables, payables, payroll dates, and recurring costs. Claude AI builds a 13-week cash forecast, flags danger zones, and sends a weekly summary to the CEO and finance lead.

skills.title: New client onboarding sequence
skills.benefit: Every new client feels like your most important from day one.
skills.desc: 14-step automation: welcome pack sent, contract dispatched, kickoff call scheduled, intro materials shared, 7-day check-in, and 30-day review booked. Zero manual coordination.

skills.title: Staff onboarding across 12 tools
skills.benefit: New hires are productive on day 1, not day 5.
skills.desc: HR trigger creates accounts across Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, GitHub, and more simultaneously, sends the welcome email, assigns a buddy, and schedules 30-60-90 reviews.

skills.title: Meeting notes to action items
skills.benefit: End the meeting chaos of lost actions.
skills.desc: Otter.ai or Fireflies transcribes your call. Claude AI extracts action items, owners, and deadlines, creates tasks in your PM tool, and sends a summary to attendees within 2 minutes.

skills.title: Project status report generator
skills.benefit: Stakeholder updates in seconds, not a stressed Friday afternoon.
skills.desc: Pulls task completion, budget burn, and risk flags from your PM tool. Claude AI writes a structured status report in your exact template, sends to stakeholders, and logs delivery.

skills.title: Google Form to project brief
skills.benefit: Turn a new brief from 3 back-and-forths into zero.
skills.desc: Client fills a scoped intake form. Workflow creates the project in your PM tool, a Notion doc with brief, client folder in Drive, and sends confirmation. Structured and ready to kick off.

skills.title: Document generation from templates
skills.benefit: Produce polished, accurate documents in seconds.
skills.desc: Client data from CRM plus Claude AI plus your Word or Google Docs template equals a completed contract, proposal, or report, personalised, formatted, and sent for signature instantly.

skills.title: Supplier invoice matching and approval
skills.benefit: Stop paying invoices that do not match what was agreed.
skills.desc: Supplier invoice arrives by email. Workflow extracts line items via Claude AI, matches against the PO, flags discrepancies, and routes to approver with matched vs unmatched view. Auto-approves clean invoices.

skills.title: AI ticket triage and routing
skills.benefit: The right agent sees the right ticket first time, every time.
skills.desc: Claude AI classifies every inbound ticket by type, urgency, sentiment, and product area, routes it to the correct queue, sets the SLA timer, and drafts a suggested reply before a human touches it.

skills.title: CSAT survey to insight report
skills.benefit: Know exactly why customers are unhappy before they churn.
skills.desc: Post-close CSAT sent automatically. Responses cluster into themes using Claude AI, with verbatim quotes, trend vs last month, and recommended actions delivered to CS lead every Friday.

skills.title: Churn risk early warning
skills.benefit: Save accounts 14 days before they cancel.
skills.desc: Monitors login frequency, support volume, NPS score, and billing history. At-risk accounts are flagged to the CS lead with a suggested intervention 14 days before typical churn patterns trigger.

skills.title: AI first-response for common queries
skills.benefit: Answer 60% of tickets instantly, 24/7, without adding headcount.
skills.desc: Claude AI reads the ticket, searches your help centre, and sends a complete answer for standard queries within 30 seconds. Escalates to humans only when confidence is below threshold.

skills.title: Ticket resolved to review request
skills.benefit: Turn every solved problem into a public five-star review.
skills.desc: 24 hours after a ticket is marked resolved, a personalised review request goes out. Positive responses go to Google or Trustpilot. Negative ones go to CS for a recovery call.

skills.title: AI knowledge base article generator
skills.benefit: Reduce repeat tickets by building your help centre automatically.
skills.desc: When the same question is answered manually 3 or more times, Claude AI drafts a help centre article from the ticket responses. Reviewed and published in one click.

skills.title: Blog post to 10-format content engine
skills.benefit: One piece of content becomes a month of social presence.
skills.desc: Publish a blog post. Claude AI extracts 5 LinkedIn posts, 3 tweet threads, 1 newsletter section, and 1 short-form video script, all queued in Buffer for review and scheduling.

skills.title: Review request sequence
skills.benefit: Double your Google review count in 90 days.
skills.desc: Project close triggers a personalised review request at the optimal moment. Positive reviews routed to Google or Trustpilot. Negative ones sent to CS for a recovery call before they go public.

skills.title: Competitor monitor and alert
skills.benefit: Know what your competitors are doing before your clients do.
skills.desc: Daily scrape of competitor pricing pages, job posts, and press mentions. Claude AI summarises what changed, flags strategic moves, and delivers a Slack brief every morning.

skills.title: Form lead to instant WhatsApp
skills.benefit: Contact leads in under 60 seconds before competitors call.
skills.desc: New form submission triggers a personalised WhatsApp message to the prospect within 60 seconds. Response rates are 3 to 5 times higher than email for the same lead.

skills.title: AI newsletter writer
skills.benefit: Send a high-quality newsletter every week without blocking your diary.
skills.desc: Every Monday: Claude AI pulls your top 5 RSS feeds, selects the 3 most relevant stories, writes commentary in your brand voice, formats the newsletter, and drops it in Mailchimp for review.

skills.title: SEO content brief generator
skills.benefit: Brief writers in minutes, not hours, and rank faster.
skills.desc: Target keyword input. Claude AI analyses top 10 SERP results, extracts gaps, suggests headings, word count, and related questions, producing a full brief ready for your writer.

skills.title: Weekly KPI digest
skills.benefit: Leadership has the full picture before Monday's first meeting.
skills.desc: Every Monday at 7 AM: pulls data from CRM, finance, and ops, formats it as a board-ready PDF with RAG status on each metric, and emails it to leadership. No manual compilation.

skills.title: Real-time dashboard sync
skills.benefit: One source of truth. No more which version is correct.
skills.desc: Pushes live data from CRM, finance, support, and marketing tools into a single Looker Studio dashboard. Refreshes every 15 minutes so everyone is always looking at the same numbers.

skills.title: Anomaly detection and root cause alert
skills.benefit: Spot the metric going wrong 48 hours before it's a crisis.
skills.desc: Claude AI monitors your key metrics daily, detects statistical anomalies, cross-references against possible causes (seasonal, campaign, team), and sends a diagnostic Slack alert with hypotheses.

skills.title: Daily sales stand-up digest
skills.benefit: Your team starts every morning knowing exactly where they stand.
skills.desc: Every morning at 8 AM: pulls yesterday's closed deals, pipeline movement, and activity metrics from your CRM. Formats as a Slack message with each rep's stats. Delivered before stand-up.

skills.title: Abandoned cart recovery sequence
skills.benefit: Recover 12-18% of abandoned carts automatically.
skills.desc: Cart abandoned triggers a 3-touch sequence: reminder at 1h, social proof + review at 24h, discount offer at 72h. Stops the moment they purchase. Works across email and SMS.

skills.title: Post-purchase upsell sequence
skills.benefit: Increase average order value by 20-35% with zero ad spend.
skills.desc: Order confirmed triggers a personalised sequence: thank you, product education, complementary product recommendation at day 3, and a loyalty offer at day 7.

skills.title: Low inventory alert and reorder
skills.benefit: Never run out of your bestsellers again.
skills.desc: Real-time stock monitoring across all SKUs. When any item drops below its reorder threshold, a draft PO goes to your supplier and your ops team gets a Slack alert.

skills.title: Client-facing performance report
skills.benefit: Clients renew when they see value. Show them it every month.
skills.desc: Pulls campaign or project metrics per client, compares vs targets, generates a branded PDF with charts, and emails to the client contact on a set date. Consistent, professional, and zero effort.

skills.title: Slack emoji to task creation
skills.benefit: Capture every request before it gets buried in threads.
skills.desc: React with a pin emoji in any Slack message and it instantly becomes a task in your PM tool with context, channel link, and the right assignee. No copy-pasting, no dropped balls.

skills.title: NPS trend tracker and alert
skills.benefit: See your customer satisfaction trajectory before it becomes a crisis.
skills.desc: Monthly NPS data pulled from your survey tool, plotted against the last 6 months, and delivered as a chart with the top 3 verbatim comments to the leadership team.

skills.title: Legal matter intake automation
skills.benefit: Turn a new enquiry into an opened matter in under 10 minutes.
skills.desc: Client enquiry comes in via web form or email. Workflow creates a matter file, runs a conflict check, sends a retainer agreement for e-signature, and books an intro call automatically.

skills.title: Legal deadline and court date alert
skills.benefit: Zero missed filing deadlines. Your professional indemnity thanks you.
skills.desc: Syncs with your case management system and court calendar. Sends layered alerts at 30, 7, 2, and 1 days before every deadline. Escalates to supervising partner if no acknowledgement.

skills.title: AI legal document assembly
skills.benefit: Draft standard legal documents in minutes instead of hours.
skills.desc: Claude AI assembles NDAs, employment contracts, retainer agreements, and standard letters from your approved templates using CRM data. Reviewed and dispatched in one click.

skills.title: Automated billing and time capture
skills.benefit: Capture every billable hour without manual time entry.
skills.desc: Integrates calendar, email, and document activity to auto-suggest time entries. Fee-earner gets a daily digest to approve or adjust. Bills generated and sent to clients on schedule.

skills.title: Candidate pipeline automation
skills.benefit: Place candidates 40% faster with zero admin overhead.
skills.desc: CV received triggers ATS entry, initial screening email, skills match score, and shortlist notification to the hiring manager within 15 minutes. Every stage moves automatically.

skills.title: Interview scheduling automation
skills.benefit: Book interviews without a single scheduling email back and forth.
skills.desc: Shortlisted candidate receives a self-serve scheduling link synced to the hiring manager's calendar. Confirmations, reminders, and interview prep packs all sent automatically.

skills.title: Timesheet approval and payroll sync
skills.benefit: Run payroll in minutes instead of a full day of chasing.
skills.desc: Contractor submits timesheet. Manager approves or rejects in one Slack click. Approved hours sync to payroll system automatically and payment is queued for the next run.

skills.title: Pre-arrival guest sequence
skills.benefit: Higher ancillary revenue and better reviews before guests arrive.
skills.desc: Booking confirmed triggers a 4-email sequence: confirmation, room upgrade offer at 7 days, spa/dining pre-book at 3 days, and a digital check-in link 24 hours before arrival.

skills.title: Guest review collection automation
skills.benefit: 25% more 5-star reviews on Tripadvisor and Google.
skills.desc: Checkout triggers a personalised thank-you email with a one-click review link. High-satisfaction responses go to TripAdvisor. Any complaint goes directly to the GM for a recovery call.

skills.title: Housekeeping and maintenance alert
skills.benefit: Zero missed room turnovers or maintenance requests.
skills.desc: Checkout logged triggers housekeeping assignment and a room-ready checklist. Guest maintenance requests filed via WhatsApp are routed to the right team and tracked to completion.

skills.title: Construction project progress report
skills.benefit: Clients and site managers always know exactly where the project stands.
skills.desc: Site manager submits a daily update form. Workflow compiles photos, progress %, and blockers into a formatted PDF report, emails it to the client, and flags any delays to the PM.

skills.title: Subcontractor onboarding and compliance
skills.benefit: Never start a project without the right paperwork signed.
skills.desc: New subcontractor added triggers a compliance pack: insurance certificate request, health & safety forms, contract for signature, and bank detail collection. All tracked to completion.

skills.title: Purchase order approval workflow
skills.benefit: Control site spend without slowing down the project.
skills.desc: Site manager raises a PO in a form. Under-threshold orders auto-approved and emailed to supplier. Above threshold gets one-click approval from the commercial manager in Slack with full context.

skills.title: Month-end close checklist automation
skills.benefit: Close the books in 3 days instead of 10.
skills.desc: At month end: workflow assigns each closing task to the right team member with a deadline, tracks completion, chases any outstanding items via Slack, and notifies the FD when all tasks are green.

skills.title: Client document collection automation
skills.benefit: Stop chasing clients for receipts and bank statements.
skills.desc: Monthly request sent automatically listing exactly what is needed. Client uploads documents via a secure link. Workflow organises by category, notifies the bookkeeper, and marks the request complete.

skills.title: Annual review scheduler and pack generator
skills.benefit: Every client gets their annual review without your PA chasing.
skills.desc: At the 11-month mark, workflow sends the review invitation, books the call, and assembles the review pack: portfolio summary, goal progress, and agenda. Compliant, consistent, and automatic.

skills.title: Regulatory compliance monitoring
skills.benefit: Stay FCA-compliant without a dedicated compliance team.
skills.desc: Monitors client record completeness, review dates, and suitability assessment expiry. Flags any at-risk records to the compliance officer 30 days before a breach, with a remediation task created.

skills.title: Content publishing pipeline
skills.benefit: Publish consistently across every channel without manual scheduling.
skills.desc: Article approved in CMS triggers automatic publication, social post creation for LinkedIn/Twitter/Facebook, email newsletter teaser, and internal Slack notification. One approval, five channels.

skills.title: AI content moderation pipeline
skills.benefit: Scale your community without scaling your moderation team.
skills.desc: User-generated content submitted. Claude AI scores for policy violations, sentiment, and spam signals. Clean content publishes instantly. Flagged content queued for human review with AI rationale attached.

skills.title: Product-led growth expansion trigger
skills.benefit: Identify expansion-ready accounts before your CS team does.
skills.desc: Usage data analysed daily by Claude AI. Accounts hitting 80% of plan limits get a personalised upgrade offer. Power users get a case study and direct outreach from the account team.

skills.title: Failed activation rescue sequence
skills.benefit: Recover users who signed up but never got value from your product.
skills.desc: User has not completed key setup steps by day 3. Workflow triggers a personalised email with the one action they are missing, then a human CS reach-out on day 5 if still stuck.

skills.title: After-call work automation
skills.benefit: Save 20 minutes per agent per shift. Instantly.
skills.desc: Call ends, Claude AI transcribes and summarises the call, creates the CRM note, categorises the outcome, and queues any follow-up action. Agent spends 0 minutes on wrap-up.

skills.title: Real-time agent assist
skills.benefit: Agents always know the right answer, even on their first day.
skills.desc: During a live call, Claude AI analyses the transcript in real time and surfaces the relevant knowledge base article, product spec, or compliance script to the agent's screen within 3 seconds.

skills.title: Automated QA scoring
skills.benefit: Score 100% of calls instead of 5%, with consistent criteria.
skills.desc: Every call transcript scored by Claude AI against your QA rubric: adherence, empathy, resolution, compliance. Scores logged, outliers flagged for manager review, and trends reported weekly.

skills.title: Restaurant reservation management automation
skills.benefit: Never double-book a table or lose a walk-in again.
skills.desc: Online reservation confirmed via form or OpenTable triggers instant SMS confirmation, table assignment, and a pre-arrival message 2h before. No-shows trigger automatic waitlist fill.

skills.title: Automated supplier ordering and stock replenishment
skills.benefit: Order exactly what you need before you run out.
skills.desc: Daily inventory count submitted via form triggers automatic PO generation to suppliers when any ingredient drops below par level. Order history logged and compared to delivery for discrepancy alerts.

skills.title: Shift scheduling and no-show cover automation
skills.benefit: Fill every shift in minutes, not hours of phone calls.
skills.desc: Rota published automatically based on forecasted covers. No-show alert fires to available staff pool via WhatsApp with one-tap accept. Manager notified and rota updated instantly.

skills.title: AI review monitoring and response drafting
skills.benefit: Respond to every Google and TripAdvisor review within 2 hours.
skills.desc: New review detected via Google My Business API. Claude AI drafts a personalised response matching the review sentiment and tone. Manager approves in one Slack click before posting.

skills.title: Customer loyalty and repeat visit automation
skills.benefit: Bring back 30% more customers with zero manual effort.
skills.desc: Every purchase logged adds points to the customer profile. Milestone reached triggers a personalised reward offer via SMS or email. Lapsed customers (45+ days) get a win-back offer automatically.

skills.title: Patient appointment reminder and no-show reduction
skills.benefit: Cut no-shows by up to 45% from day one.
skills.desc: Appointment booked triggers SMS and email reminders at 72h, 24h, and 2h. Patient can confirm or cancel in one tap. Cancellation immediately opens slot to waitlist with automated fill.

skills.title: Patient referral tracking and follow-up
skills.benefit: Track every referral from GP to specialist without a spreadsheet.
skills.desc: Referral letter sent triggers a case file creation, specialist notification, and patient welcome message. Progress tracked with automated follow-up if no response within 5 business days.

skills.title: Lab result notification and follow-up
skills.benefit: Patients get results faster. Clinicians save hours of manual calls.
skills.desc: Lab result received from system triggers automated patient notification via SMS. Abnormal results flagged for immediate clinician review with a priority alert. Normal results include self-service booking for follow-up.

skills.title: Post-visit patient satisfaction survey
skills.benefit: Collect actionable feedback from every patient automatically.
skills.desc: 24h after each appointment, a short 3-question satisfaction survey is sent via SMS. Responses below 4/5 trigger an immediate manager alert for service recovery. High scores prompt a Google review request.

skills.title: Prescription refill reminder automation
skills.benefit: Patients never miss a refill. Pharmacies never lose a customer.
skills.desc: Prescription dispensed date plus days-supply calculates the refill date. Automated reminder sent 7 days and 2 days before estimated run-out. One-tap booking or repeat request link included.

skills.title: Donor management and stewardship automation
skills.benefit: Keep every donor engaged without a full-time fundraising team.
skills.desc: New donation triggers instant personalised thank-you, tax receipt, and impact update. Lapsed donors (90+ days) enter a re-engagement sequence. Major donors flagged for personal outreach.

skills.title: Grant deadline tracking and application pipeline
skills.benefit: Never miss a grant deadline or submission requirement.
skills.desc: Grant deadlines added to a central tracker trigger layered alerts at 60, 30, 14, and 7 days. Required documents tracked with automatic chase to team members. Submission confirmed and logged.

skills.title: Volunteer coordination and shift management
skills.benefit: Fill volunteer shifts in hours instead of days.
skills.desc: New volunteer registered triggers welcome email and skill assessment form. Upcoming shifts sent 7 days ahead with one-tap sign-up. No-fills escalated with a broadcast to the volunteer pool.

skills.title: Automated donation receipts and tax certificates
skills.benefit: Every donor gets a HMRC/IRS-compliant receipt instantly.
skills.desc: Donation processed via Stripe or PayPal triggers automatic generation of a personalised tax receipt PDF. Gift Aid declaration captured at point of donation. Annual giving summary sent in January.

skills.title: Student enrollment and welcome automation
skills.benefit: New students are set up and ready before their first day.
skills.desc: Application approved triggers enrolment confirmation, fee payment link, course materials, timetable, and a welcome email sequence. Student record created across all systems simultaneously.

skills.title: Assignment deadline reminder sequence
skills.benefit: Reduce late submissions by 60% without any manual chasing.
skills.desc: Assignment added to the course calendar triggers automated student reminders at 7 days, 2 days, and 12 hours before deadline. Late submission triggers a support check-in within 2 hours.

skills.title: Fee collection and payment reminder automation
skills.benefit: Reduce overdue fees by 50% without uncomfortable conversations.
skills.desc: Invoice issued and tracked. Overdue at 7 days triggers a polite reminder. 14 days adds a payment plan option. 30 days escalates to the finance manager with full account history.

skills.title: Automated course completion certificates
skills.benefit: Every student gets their certificate the moment they finish.
skills.desc: Course completion recorded triggers automatic PDF certificate generation with the student's name, course title, and date. Emailed instantly and stored in their student record.

skills.title: Shipment tracking and customer notification
skills.benefit: Customers always know where their order is. Support tickets drop by 40%.
skills.desc: Carrier tracking event triggers automatic customer notification via SMS and email at dispatch, in-transit, out-for-delivery, and delivered stages. Failed delivery triggers rebooking flow automatically.

skills.title: Delivery exception alert and resolution workflow
skills.benefit: Resolve delivery problems before the customer even notices.
skills.desc: Carrier exception event (delay, damage, lost) triggers immediate alert to logistics team with full shipment details. Customer proactively notified with apology and resolution options. SLA clock started.

skills.title: Fleet maintenance scheduling automation
skills.benefit: Zero unplanned breakdowns from missed service intervals.
skills.desc: Vehicle mileage and date tracked against service schedules. Alert fired to fleet manager and driver at 500 miles and 1 week before service due. Garage booking created automatically.

skills.title: Warehouse inventory sync across platforms
skills.benefit: One source of truth for stock across every sales channel.
skills.desc: Inventory movements in the warehouse system push real-time updates to Shopify, Amazon, eBay, and your ERP simultaneously. Low stock triggers reorder. Discrepancies flagged for audit.

skills.title: Policy renewal reminder and cross-sell sequence
skills.benefit: Retain 20% more policies at renewal with zero manual effort.
skills.desc: Policy expiry date triggers a renewal campaign: email at 90 days with summary, call scheduling at 60 days, SMS reminder at 30 days, and a final urgent notice at 7 days with a direct renewal link.

skills.title: Claims intake and document collection automation
skills.benefit: Process claims 3x faster with zero manual data entry.
skills.desc: Claim submitted via web form triggers case file creation, claimant acknowledgement within 5 minutes, document checklist sent, and adjuster assignment with full case briefing. SLA clock started.

skills.title: Regulatory compliance report automation
skills.benefit: FCA/PRA compliance reports generated and filed automatically.
skills.desc: Monthly: data pulled from policy management system, formatted to regulator template, cross-checked for completeness, and delivered to compliance officer for sign-off before the filing deadline.

skills.title: Broker commission calculation and payment
skills.benefit: Pay brokers accurately and on time, every time.
skills.desc: Policy sold triggers commission calculation based on product and tier. Monthly summary reconciled against sales data, payment queued in payroll system, and broker receives a detailed statement.

skills.title: Rent collection reminder and arrears management
skills.benefit: Reduce rent arrears by 60% without any awkward conversations.
skills.desc: Rent due date triggers automated reminder 5 days before, on the day, and at 3 days overdue. Persistent arrears escalate to the property manager with a formal notice template ready to send.

skills.title: Maintenance request routing and resolution tracking
skills.benefit: Every repair tracked from report to completion. Tenants kept informed.
skills.desc: Tenant submits maintenance request via form or WhatsApp. Workflow categorises by urgency, assigns to the right contractor, notifies tenant of ETA, and tracks completion with photo confirmation.

skills.title: New tenant onboarding automation
skills.benefit: New tenants are move-in ready before they collect the keys.
skills.desc: Tenancy agreed triggers a full onboarding sequence: welcome pack, standing order setup instructions, utility transfer checklist, inventory sign-off booking, and emergency contact info. All logged and tracked.

skills.title: Lease renewal campaign automation
skills.benefit: Retain 80% of tenants at renewal without a single cold call.
skills.desc: 6 months before lease expiry: personalised renewal offer sent with updated terms. 3 months: follow-up with incentive. 6 weeks: final offer with vacancy warning. Accepted triggers new tenancy workflow.

skills.title: AI contract clause risk detection
skills.benefit: Identify risky contract clauses in seconds, not hours of legal review.
skills.desc: Contract uploaded as PDF. Claude AI scans for red-flag clauses: unlimited liability, auto-renewal traps, IP assignment, non-compete scope. Risk summary delivered to reviewer with specific clause citations.

skills.title: AI invoice data extraction from PDF
skills.benefit: Zero manual data entry from supplier invoices ever again.
skills.desc: Invoice PDF arrives by email. Claude AI extracts vendor, date, line items, VAT, and totals with 99%+ accuracy. Data pushed to accounting system, PO matched, and discrepancies flagged for review.

skills.title: AI social media content calendar generator
skills.benefit: 30 days of on-brand content planned and drafted in one go.
skills.desc: Brand brief and key dates input. Claude AI generates a 30-day content calendar with post drafts for LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter, and TikTok, calibrated by platform format and audience.

skills.title: AI job description writer and publisher
skills.benefit: Write and post a compelling job description in under 5 minutes.
skills.desc: Job title and requirements input to a form. Claude AI writes a complete job description calibrated for the role, seniority, and company tone. Auto-posted to LinkedIn, Indeed, and your career page.

skills.title: AI sales call transcript analysis
skills.benefit: Extract objections, next steps, and deal risk from every call automatically.
skills.desc: Call recording transcribed and fed to Claude AI. Extracts: key objections raised, competitor mentions, buying signals, agreed next steps, and deal risk score. All pushed to CRM within 10 minutes of call end.

skills.title: AI property listing description generator
skills.benefit: Compelling listings written in seconds, not hours.
skills.desc: Agent fills a structured form with property specs. Claude AI writes a professional listing description calibrated for the target buyer persona and platform (Rightmove, Zoopla, OnTheMarket). Published automatically.

skills.title: AI expense categorisation from bank statements
skills.benefit: Bookkeeping reconciliation in minutes instead of hours.
skills.desc: Bank statement imported. Claude AI categorises every transaction against your chart of accounts with 95%+ accuracy. Uncategorised items flagged for review. Data pushed directly to Xero or QuickBooks.

skills.title: AI grant proposal first draft generator
skills.benefit: Cut proposal writing time by 70%. More applications, more funding.
skills.desc: Grant guidelines and organisation brief input. Claude AI generates a structured first draft aligned to the funder's priorities, with executive summary, theory of change, and budget narrative sections.

skills.title: AI employee performance review drafter
skills.benefit: Fair, consistent performance reviews written in minutes per employee.
skills.desc: Manager inputs key achievements, areas for development, and goals. Claude AI drafts the full performance review in a structured format aligned to company competencies. Manager edits and approves.

skills.title: AI customer sentiment analysis pipeline
skills.benefit: Know how every customer feels about your business in real time.
skills.desc: Reviews, support tickets, and survey responses fed to Claude AI daily. Sentiment scored, themes extracted, and a weekly brand health dashboard generated. Sudden sentiment drops trigger an immediate alert.

skills.title: Shopify to Xero real-time accounting sync
skills.benefit: Every sale, refund, and fee reconciled automatically. Zero manual entry.
skills.desc: Every Shopify order, refund, and Stripe payout instantly creates the correct accounting entry in Xero, categorised, tax-coded, and reconciled. Monthly bank rec takes minutes instead of days.

skills.title: Salesforce to HubSpot bidirectional sync
skills.benefit: Sales and marketing always working from the same data.
skills.desc: Contacts, deals, and activities sync bidirectionally between Salesforce and HubSpot in near real-time. Conflict resolution rules handle duplicate records. Field mapping fully configurable.

skills.title: Stripe to QuickBooks automated sync
skills.benefit: All Stripe revenue, fees, and refunds in QuickBooks without touching a spreadsheet.
skills.desc: Every Stripe payment, payout, and refund creates the correct QuickBooks entry with right account codes, tax rates, and customer records. Reconciliation report emailed weekly.

skills.title: Typeform responses to Notion database
skills.benefit: Every form response organised and searchable in Notion instantly.
skills.desc: New Typeform submission creates a structured Notion page with all response fields, tags applied based on answers, and relevant team members notified in Slack with a direct link.

skills.title: Calendly to HubSpot contact and deal creation
skills.benefit: Every meeting booked becomes a CRM record instantly.
skills.desc: Calendly booking triggers HubSpot contact creation or update, deal creation at the right pipeline stage, a reminder sequence for the prospect, and a prep pack for the sales rep.

skills.title: GitHub PR to Jira ticket sync
skills.benefit: Dev and product always on the same page without manual updates.
skills.desc: GitHub PR opened automatically creates or updates the linked Jira ticket. PR merged marks Jira done and notifies the product owner. Failed CI notifies the ticket assignee with the error log.

skills.title: Facebook Lead Ads to CRM instant push
skills.benefit: Follow up on Facebook leads within 60 seconds of submission.
skills.desc: Facebook Lead Ad submission triggers instant CRM contact creation, lead source tagged, a personalised email within 90 seconds, and a WhatsApp message within 2 minutes. No leads left to go cold.

skills.title: Zapier workflow migration to n8n
skills.benefit: Cut your automation costs by 60% and get full control of your stack.
skills.desc: PURIST maps all your existing Zaps, rebuilds them as n8n workflows on your own infrastructure, tests each against real data, and documents everything. Zapier subscription cancelled. Zero downtime migration.

skills.title: WooCommerce to ShipStation order automation
skills.benefit: Orders picked, packed and shipped faster with zero manual entry.
skills.desc: New WooCommerce order pushed to ShipStation with correct shipping method, weight, and recipient. Tracking number synced back to WooCommerce and customer notified. Exceptions flagged to ops.

skills.title: Intercom to Zendesk ticket sync
skills.benefit: Support teams working across both tools with no duplication.
skills.desc: New Intercom conversation above severity threshold creates a Zendesk ticket with full context. Resolution in either system syncs the other. Escalations flow correctly between platforms.

skills.title: Failed login alert and account lockout automation
skills.benefit: Stop credential attacks before they become breaches.
skills.desc: 5+ failed login attempts on any account triggers immediate Slack alert to IT security, temporary account lock, and a password reset email to the user. All events logged in the security audit trail.

skills.title: GDPR right-to-erasure request handler
skills.benefit: Process data deletion requests in 24 hours instead of 30 days.
skills.desc: Subject access or deletion request received via email or form. Workflow identifies all data stores containing that individual, logs the request with timestamp, and routes to the DPO for sign-off and execution.

skills.title: Employee offboarding access revocation automation
skills.benefit: No ex-employee retains access after their last day. Ever.
skills.desc: HR confirms departure date. On last day: all accounts across Google Workspace, Slack, GitHub, CRM, and other tools revoked simultaneously. IT notified. Access log archived. Manager transfers ownership.

skills.title: API key rotation and secret management automation
skills.benefit: Rotate credentials before they're exploited, not after.
skills.desc: On schedule or trigger: old API keys revoked, new keys generated and distributed to the relevant services, documentation updated, and the security team notified. Zero manual secret handling.

skills.title: Phishing email report to IT ticket automation
skills.benefit: Phishing attempts investigated within 1 hour instead of going unnoticed.
skills.desc: User reports suspicious email to a dedicated mailbox. Workflow creates an IT security ticket, extracts email headers and links for analysis, notifies the security team, and sends the reporter an acknowledgement.

skills.title: Gym membership renewal and churn prevention
skills.benefit: Retain 25% more members at renewal with personalised outreach.
skills.desc: Membership expiry approaching triggers a personalised renewal offer 30 days, 7 days, and 1 day before. Expired members enter a win-back sequence with a discounted rejoining offer at 7 and 30 days.

skills.title: New member welcome and activation sequence
skills.benefit: Members who activate in week 1 are 80% more likely to stay.
skills.desc: New membership sold triggers a 10-touch welcome sequence: welcome video, induction booking, facility tour, class timetable, nutrition tips, and a 30-day check-in. PT upsell offered at day 7.

skills.title: Class booking confirmation and reminder
skills.benefit: Fewer no-shows. Fuller classes. Happier instructors.
skills.desc: Class booked triggers instant confirmation with location map and what-to-bring tips. Reminder sent 2h before. Cancellation within 2h of class flags the spot to the waitlist automatically.

skills.title: New hire multi-system onboarding
skills.benefit: New hires are fully set up across all tools before they arrive.
skills.desc: Offer accepted triggers account creation in Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, and CRM simultaneously. Welcome email sent, buddy assigned, 30-60-90 plan created, and first-week calendar blocked.

skills.title: Leave request approval and calendar sync
skills.benefit: No more email chains for holiday approvals.
skills.desc: Employee submits leave request via form. Manager notified via Slack with one-click approve or reject. Approved leave syncs to Google Calendar, HRIS, and project management tool automatically.

skills.title: Slack message to Notion task
skills.benefit: Turn every important Slack message into a tracked task before it disappears.
skills.desc: React to any Slack message with a specific emoji and it instantly creates a fully-formed Notion task with the message content, sender, channel link, and a due date. No context is lost and no action falls through the cracks.

skills.title: Gmail attachment extractor to Drive
skills.benefit: Stop hunting for attachments buried in email threads.
skills.desc: Every incoming Gmail attachment matching your label or sender rules is automatically saved to the correct Google Drive folder, renamed with a consistent convention, and logged in a Google Sheet. Files are organised and findable from the moment they arrive.

skills.title: Google Sheets to HubSpot contact sync
skills.benefit: Your spreadsheet contacts are always live in your CRM without any manual import.
skills.desc: Any new or updated row in a designated Google Sheet is matched against HubSpot by email, then created or updated automatically. Supports custom field mapping so your sheet columns map exactly to your CRM properties.

skills.title: Typeform response to Airtable and Slack
skills.benefit: Form responses are in your database and your team attention in seconds.
skills.desc: Every Typeform submission is instantly written to a mapped Airtable base and a formatted Slack notification is sent to the relevant channel. Custom routing rules let different form types go to different Airtable tables and Slack channels.

skills.title: Shopify order to Slack and Xero
skills.benefit: Every sale is celebrated in Slack and booked in Xero the instant it happens.
skills.desc: New Shopify order triggers a Slack notification to the sales channel with order value, product, and customer name, while simultaneously creating the correct invoice and accounting entry in Xero. No manual bookkeeping for any order.

skills.title: GitHub issue to Jira ticket
skills.benefit: Engineering and product stay in sync without anyone copy-pasting issues.
skills.desc: When a new GitHub issue is created or labelled, a corresponding Jira ticket is created with the issue title, description, labels, and a link back to GitHub. Status updates in Jira are reflected back on the GitHub issue as comments.

skills.title: Calendly booking to calendar and SMS
skills.benefit: Every booking is confirmed, calendared, and the client reminded without any manual steps.
skills.desc: New Calendly booking fires instantly: the event is added to a shared Google Calendar, the client receives an SMS confirmation with meeting link and prep notes, and a 24-hour reminder SMS is scheduled automatically.

skills.title: WhatsApp chatbot for customer FAQ
skills.benefit: Answer customer questions 24/7 on the channel they already use.
skills.desc: Inbound WhatsApp messages are read by Claude AI, matched against your FAQ knowledge base, and answered instantly in a conversational tone. Unanswered questions are escalated to a human agent with full conversation context attached.

skills.title: LinkedIn post scheduler from Notion
skills.benefit: Keep your LinkedIn presence consistent without remembering to post.
skills.desc: Add a post to a Notion content database, set a publish date, and the workflow handles the rest. At the scheduled time it publishes directly to LinkedIn, marks the Notion entry as published, and logs engagement metrics back the following day.

skills.title: AI email categorisation and labelling
skills.benefit: Zero inbox chaos. Every email is sorted and prioritised before you read it.
skills.desc: Claude AI reads every inbound email, classifies it by type (support, sales, billing, spam, urgent), applies the correct Gmail label, and routes it to the right team inbox or Slack channel. High-priority emails are flagged for immediate attention.

skills.title: PDF invoice data extraction via AI
skills.benefit: Extract and book every supplier invoice without anyone typing a number.
skills.desc: PDF invoices arriving by email are passed to Claude AI, which extracts vendor, date, line items, totals, and tax. Structured data is written to Xero or QuickBooks and a Google Sheet log, with any low-confidence extractions flagged for human review.

skills.title: Jira ticket to Slack team alert
skills.benefit: The right team member knows about every new ticket the moment it lands.
skills.desc: New Jira tickets are instantly routed to the correct Slack channel based on project, priority, and component. High-priority and blocker tickets trigger a direct message to the assignee and team lead, so nothing critical sits unread.

skills.title: Google Analytics weekly report to Slack
skills.benefit: Your whole team sees website performance every Monday with zero manual effort.
skills.desc: Every Monday morning the workflow pulls the previous week sessions, conversions, top pages, and traffic sources from Google Analytics 4, formats them into a clean summary, and posts to a Slack channel and emails the marketing lead.

skills.title: Notion database to weekly email digest
skills.benefit: Keep stakeholders informed with zero manual newsletter writing.
skills.desc: Every week the workflow queries a Notion database for new or updated records matching your filter, formats the results into a clean email digest, and delivers it to your subscriber list. Ideal for project updates, content schedules, or knowledge base changes.

skills.title: Customer churn prediction alert
skills.benefit: Intervene with at-risk accounts 30 days before they cancel.
skills.desc: Claude AI analyses each account login frequency, support ticket volume, feature usage, and billing history weekly. Accounts crossing the risk threshold are flagged with a churn probability score, key warning signals, and a suggested intervention sent directly to the CS lead.

skills.title: New hire onboarding across all tools
skills.benefit: New hires are fully set up and productive on day one, not day five.
skills.desc: HR trigger from your ATS or HRIS creates accounts across Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, and your other tools simultaneously. Welcome email sent, buddy assigned, 30-60-90 day milestones booked, and an onboarding checklist created for the manager.

skills.title: Performance review reminder automation
skills.benefit: No review is ever missed or submitted late again.
skills.desc: Scheduled triggers generate personalised reminders to managers and employees at 14 days, 7 days, and 1 day before each review deadline, with direct links to the review form. Completed submissions trigger a confirmation and update a tracking sheet.

skills.title: Job application to ATS and Slack shortlist
skills.benefit: Great candidates are reviewed and contacted before your competitors see them.
skills.desc: New job application triggers CV parsing and enrichment, creates a candidate record in your ATS, and routes a formatted Slack summary to the hiring manager. AI-scored candidates above your threshold are flagged for same-day review.

skills.title: SSL certificate expiry monitor
skills.benefit: Never let a certificate expire and take your site offline unexpectedly.
skills.desc: Daily check of all your domain SSL certificates. At 30, 14, and 7 days before expiry, automated alerts go to the DevOps team via Slack and email with the domain, expiry date, and renewal instructions. A critical alert fires at 3 days.

skills.title: Failed login alert to Slack and email
skills.benefit: Spot brute force attempts and account takeovers in real time.
skills.desc: Monitors your auth logs or identity provider for failed login patterns. More than five failures in ten minutes for any account triggers an immediate Slack alert and email to your security team with IP, timestamp, and affected account for rapid triage.

skills.title: GDPR data deletion request workflow
skills.benefit: Handle right-to-erasure requests compliantly and on time, every time.
skills.desc: Inbound GDPR deletion request triggers identity verification, then orchestrates deletion across your CRM, email tool, database, and analytics platform. Full audit log created in Google Sheets, confirmation sent to the data subject, and the DPO notified within your 30-day obligation window.

skills.title: API uptime monitor with PagerDuty alert
skills.benefit: Know about API downtime before your customers do.
skills.desc: Every five minutes the workflow pings your critical API endpoints and validates response codes and latency. Any failure or degradation triggers a PagerDuty incident, a Slack alert with response details, and a status page update automatically.

skills.title: Multi-step CRM-to-CRM data migration
skills.benefit: Migrate your entire CRM to a new platform without losing a record.
skills.desc: Exports contacts, companies, deals, activities, and notes from your source CRM, transforms field mappings to match the target schema, deduplicates on import, and migrates in batches with error logging and retry logic. Full migration report generated on completion.

skills.title: AI meeting transcript to CRM notes
skills.benefit: Every sales call is logged, summarised, and actioned in your CRM automatically.
skills.desc: Meeting transcript from Fireflies or Otter.ai is passed to Claude AI, which extracts a structured summary, next steps, objections raised, and key commitments. All written to the CRM contact record with next tasks created and assigned within two minutes of the call ending.

skills.title: Social media mention monitor and Slack alert
skills.benefit: Respond to every brand mention within minutes, not days.
skills.desc: Continuously monitors Twitter/X, Reddit, and Google Alerts for mentions of your brand, product, and key competitors. Claude AI classifies each mention by sentiment and urgency, then posts a formatted summary to the relevant Slack channel with a direct link to respond.
